0.text: Stable peripheral ground glass nodular opacities in the right upper lobe apicoposterior segment

1.text: Stable peripheral ground glass nodular opacities in the right lower lobe superior segment

2.text: Stable peripheral ground glass nodular opacities in the left lung apex

3.text: Newly emerged bud branch appearance in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

4.text: Acinar opacities in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

5.text: Increased ground-glass nodular density in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung
